name: Black-Eyed Pea Jambalaya
recipeIngredient: 2 chicken breasts, skin and bone removed
recipeInstructions:
1. Save any leftover meats in the freezer and add them to the pot.
You can also add a can of sliced water chestnuts or peas, saving their liquid to use later.
2. Add the rice to the pot with the remaining ingredients.
3. Cut the butter into pats and place on top.
4. In a 4-cup measuring cup, combine the soup, tomato juice, black-eyed pea juice (and any other juices you are using), and enough water to make 4 cups. Pour this mixture over the rice combination and add an additional cup.
5. Cook until the liquid is absorbed and the rice is tender but still a little moist.
